# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response, Router } from "express";
import {
  createConnection,
  Entity,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
  Column,
  Connection,
  Repository,
} from "typeorm";

// ==================== Entity ====================

@Entity("products")
export class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 255 })
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: "text", nullable: true })
  description!: string;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 10, scale: 2 })
  price!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 100, nullable: true })
  category!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 100, nullable: true })
  brand!: string;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 3, scale: 2, default: 0 })
  rating!: number;

  @Column({ type: "int", default: 0 })
  stock!: number;

  @Column({ type: "boolean", default: true })
  active!: boolean;

  @Column({ type: "timestamp", default: () => "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" })
  createdAt!: Date;
}

// ==================== Search Interface ====================

interface ProductSearchQuery {
  name?: string;
  category?: string;
  brand?: string;
  minPrice?: string;
  maxPrice?: string;
  minRating?: string;
  inStock?: string;
  sortBy?: string;
  sortOrder?: string;
  page?: string;
  limit?: string;
}

// ==================== Allowed sort columns (whitelist) ====================

const ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS: Record<string, string> = {
  name: "product.name",
  price: "product.price",
  rating: "product.rating",
  createdAt: "product.createdAt",
  stock: "product.stock",
};

const ALLOWED_SORT_ORDERS = new Set(["ASC", "DESC"]);

// ==================== Search Service ====================

class ProductSearchService {
  private repository: Repository<Product>;

  constructor(repository: Repository<Product>) {
    this.repository = repository;
  }

  async search(filters: ProductSearchQuery) {
    // Use TypeORM QueryBuilder which supports parameterized queries safely
    const qb = this.repository.createQueryBuilder("product");

    // Always filter for active products
    qb.where("product.active = :active", { active: true });

    // Dynamic filters — all parameterized to prevent SQL injection
    if (filters.name && typeof filters.name === "string") {
      qb.andWhere("product.name ILIKE :name", {
        name: `%${filters.name}%`,
      });
    }

    if (filters.category && typeof filters.category === "string") {
      qb.andWhere("product.category = :category", {
        category: filters.category,
      });
    }

    if (filters.brand && typeof filters.brand === "string") {
      qb.andWhere("product.brand = :brand", {
        brand: filters.brand,
      });
    }

    if (filters.minPrice) {
      const minPrice = parseFloat(filters.minPrice);
      if (!isNaN(minPrice) && minPrice >= 0) {
        qb.andWhere("product.price >= :minPrice", { minPrice });
      }
    }

    if (filters.maxPrice) {
      const maxPrice = parseFloat(filters.maxPrice);
      if (!isNaN(maxPrice) && maxPrice >= 0) {
        qb.andWhere("product.price <= :maxPrice", { maxPrice });
      }
    }

    if (filters.minRating) {
      const minRating = parseFloat(filters.minRating);
      if (!isNaN(minRating) && minRating >= 0 && minRating <= 5) {
        qb.andWhere("product.rating >= :minRating", { minRating });
      }
    }

    if (filters.inStock === "true") {
      qb.andWhere("product.stock > 0");
    }

    // Sorting — validated against a whitelist to prevent injection
    const sortBy = filters.sortBy ? ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS[filters.sortBy] : null;
    const sortOrder =
      filters.sortOrder && ALLOWED_SORT_ORDERS.has(filters.sortOrder.toUpperCase())
        ? (filters.sortOrder.toUpperCase() as "ASC" | "DESC")
        : "ASC";

    if (sortBy) {
      qb.orderBy(sortBy, sortOrder);
    } else {
      qb.orderBy("product.createdAt", "DESC");
    }

    // Pagination — parsed and bounded to prevent abuse
    const page = Math.max(1, parseInt(filters.page || "1", 10) || 1);
    const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, parseInt(filters.limit || "20", 10) || 20));
    const offset = (page - 1) * limit;

    qb.skip(offset).take(limit);

    const [products, total] = await qb.getManyAndCount();

    return {
      products,
      pagination: {
        page,
        limit,
        total,
        totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit),
      },
    };
  }
}

// ==================== Controller / Router ====================

function createProductRouter(connection: Connection): Router {
  const router = Router();
  const productRepository = connection.getRepository(Product);
  const searchService = new ProductSearchService(productRepository);

  /**
   * GET /api/products/search
   *
   * Query params:
   *   name       - partial match (case-insensitive)
   *   category   - exact match
   *   brand      - exact match
   *   minPrice   - minimum price
   *   maxPrice   - maximum price
   *   minRating  - minimum rating (0-5)
   *   inStock    - "true" to show only in-stock
   *   sortBy     - one of: name, price, rating, createdAt, stock
   *   sortOrder  - ASC or DESC
   *   page       - page number (default 1)
   *   limit      - results per page (default 20, max 100)
   */
  router.get("/search", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
    try {
      const filters: ProductSearchQuery = {
        name: req.query.name as string | undefined,
        category: req.query.category as string | undefined,
        brand: req.query.brand as string | undefined,
        minPrice: req.query.minPrice as string | undefined,
        maxPrice: req.query.maxPrice as string | undefined,
        minRating: req.query.minRating as string | undefined,
        inStock: req.query.inStock as string | undefined,
        sortBy: req.query.sortBy as string | undefined,
        sortOrder: req.query.sortOrder as string | undefined,
        page: req.query.page as string | undefined,
        limit: req.query.limit as string | undefined,
      };

      const result = await searchService.search(filters);

      res.json({
        success: true,
        data: result.products,
        pagination: result.pagination,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Product search error:", error);
      res.status(500).json({
        success: false,
        message: "An error occurred while searching products.",
      });
    }
  });

  return router;
}

// ==================== App Bootstrap ====================

async function bootstrap() {
  const connection = await createConnection({
    type: "postgres",
    host: process.env.DB_HOST || "localhost",
    port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || "5432", 10),
    username: process.env.DB_USER || "postgres",
    password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || "postgres",
    database: process.env.DB_NAME || "ecommerce",
    entities: [Product],
    synchronize: process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production",
    logging: process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production",
  });

  const app = express();
  app.use(express.json());

  const productRouter = createProductRouter(connection);
  app.use("/api/products", productRouter);

  const port = parseInt(process.env.PORT || "3000", 10);
  app.listen(port, () => {
    console.log(`Product search API running on port ${port}`);
  });
}

bootstrap().catch((err) => {
  console.error("Failed to start application:", err);
  process.exit(1);
});

export { Product, ProductSearchService, createProductRouter };
